title: New Javonte Williams deal was a good start, but Jerry Jones still has plenty of work to do
content: Before giving the Cowboys owner/GM too much credit, let’s reserve judgment until the rest of this offseason plays out.

title: Can Scheffler, Spieth and Coody secure top-10 finish at Genesis Invitational?
content: Scottie Scheffler (5-under) is tied for 22nd, while Jordan Spieth and Pierceson Coody (6-under) are tied for 15th after ...
